title: Psychies: Creatures of Emotion
description: Cobblemon datapack adding Psychies to Minecraft
body:
A datapack that brings Psychies to Cobblemon! Psychies are a personal design project of mine where I have been designing monsters based on various emotions and human experiences. Though not technically fakemon, I wanted to include them into Cobblemon and give them stats, moves and abilities like Pokemon do. All come with models, animations and shinies as well!


The current Psychies in the pack are:

**Derbling - Psychie of Playfulness** (Normal/Fairy). Found in meadows, plains, savannahs, sunflower plains and blooming plateaus.

![Derbling Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89771dcb637a4da91528527715f62150e13ca2eb.png)



**Popora - Psychie of Curiosity** (Steel/Ghost). Found in lush caves, fungal caves and the deep dark along with several overworld structures.

![Popora Walking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44f52cc79eaebfd2b144ec6fff548ddd932c8d6.png)



**Dreadline - Psychie of Stress** (Water/Dark). Found in the deep ocean.

![Dreadline Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9c1c59d9858227b82e5cf71a18ef3f85654f758.png)



**Huwatt - Psychie of Confusion** (Electric/Psychic). Found in the end and during thunder storms.

![Huwatt Walking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/300c1372162ec858b8927389e0bfd69f8d5893df.png)



**Nagasius - Psychie of Insecurity** (Rock/Poison). Found near villages.

![Nagasius Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e7d7cbe7e6ee3aab6724394886bf2509cf9a48.png)



**Cinderling - Psychie of Determination** (Steel/Fire). Found in the nether or near a campfire.

![Cinderling Walking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2f45fea18348677a47113c4f7a1a5191bdd56e8.png)



**Petrillop - Psychie of Panic** (Rock/Flying). Found in dripstone caves or on mountaintops.

![Petrillop Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c535f981fa1dab4eb56f2627137c19452197c41.png)



**Slappelin - Psychie of Humour** (Fairy/Fighting). Found in woodland mansions or near cake.

![Slappelin Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2d77e6875cb1bd21c301c0f76c7a2d9f82edeb.png)



**Carquette - Psychie of Intimacy** (Rock). Found in the badlands and in cherry blossom biomes.

![Carquette Walking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221535508a1515b4b1ba29d710b0191153af622f.png)



**Heartree - Psychie of Hospitality** (Grass/Ghost). Found in forest biomes.

![Heartree Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/013d589f6af8841b3118834a3575b6669b7b007e.png)



**Serabetta - Psychie of Tranquility** (Water/Normal). Found in lukewarm and warm oceans.

![Serabetta Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a871b4b5cd64c8776630785793de8934fb54f6d.png)



**Burocules - Psychie of Responsibility** (Fighting/Dark). Found in villages during the night.

![Burocules Walking Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4786b55f7b67156c29f83a8b86879b0ea17f8e6.png)



**Lapastral - Psychie of Wonder** (Psychic). Found in the end and magical biomes.

![Lapastral Idle Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/384b6106587b6b5636af84949695ae9af20cd12e.png)
